# withWorkLoop(IOService *, IOWorkLoop *, UInt32)

Should never be used, obsolete. See IOCommandPool::withWorkLoop.

## Declaration

```swift
static IOCommandPool *commandPool(
 IOService *inOwner, 
 IOWorkLoop *inWorkLoop, 
 UInt32 inSize = kIOCommandPoolDefaultSize); 
```
